name: simple_match_filter_limit
query: MATCH (u:User) WHERE u.name = $name RETURN u.name ORDER BY u.name LIMIT 1

name: relationship_projection
query: MATCH (a:User)-[r:KNOWS]->(b:User) RETURN a.name AS from_name, r.note AS note, b.name AS to_name ORDER BY from_name, to_name

name: optional_match_string_filter
query: OPTIONAL MATCH (u:User) WHERE u.name STARTS WITH 'Al' RETURN u.name AS name ORDER BY name

name: optional_match_grouped_count
query: OPTIONAL MATCH (u:User) RETURN u.name AS name, count(u) AS total ORDER BY total DESC

name: with_scalar_rebinding
query: MATCH (u:User) WITH u.name AS name RETURN name ORDER BY name

name: with_grouped_aggregate
query: MATCH (u:User) WITH u.name AS name, u.score AS score RETURN name, max(score) AS top ORDER BY top DESC

name: variable_length_projection
query: MATCH (a:User)-[:KNOWS*1..2]->(b:User) RETURN a.name AS user_name, b.name AS friend ORDER BY friend

name: variable_length_grouped_count
query: MATCH (a:User)-[:KNOWS*1..2]->(b:User) RETURN b.name AS friend, count(b) AS total ORDER BY total DESC

name: searched_case_projection
query: MATCH (u:User) WITH u.age AS age, u.name AS name RETURN CASE WHEN age >= 18 THEN name ELSE 'minor' END AS label ORDER BY label

name: graph_introspection
query: MATCH (a:User)-[r:KNOWS]->(b:User) RETURN id(a) AS uid, type(r) AS rel_type, startNode(r).id AS start_id, endNode(r).id AS end_id ORDER BY uid

name: metadata_projection
query: MATCH (a:User)-[r:KNOWS]->(b:User) RETURN properties(a) AS user_props, labels(a) AS user_labels, keys(r) AS rel_keys ORDER BY user_props, user_labels, rel_keys

name: relationship_property_functions
query: MATCH (a:User)-[r:KNOWS]->(b:User) RETURN lower(r.note) AS lower_note, size(r.note) AS note_len, toString(r.weight) AS weight_text ORDER BY lower_note, note_len, weight_text

name: unwind_literal_list
query: UNWIND [1, 2, 3] AS x RETURN x AS value ORDER BY value DESC LIMIT 2

name: create_node_program
query: CREATE (:User {name: 'Alice', age: 30})

name: traversal_create_program
query: MATCH (a:User)-[r:KNOWS]->(b:User) CREATE (a)-[:INTRODUCED]->(:Person {name: 'Cara'})

name: traversal_merge_program
query: MATCH (a:User)-[r:KNOWS]->(b:User) MERGE (a)-[:INTRODUCED]->(:Person {name: 'Cara'})

name: match_set_node
query: MATCH (u:User) WHERE u.name = $name SET u.age = 31

name: match_delete_relationship
query: MATCH (a:User)-[r:KNOWS]->(b:User) DELETE r

name: vector_query_nodes_match
query: CALL db.index.vector.queryNodes('user_embedding_idx', 1, $query) YIELD node, score MATCH (node:User) RETURN node.id, score ORDER BY score DESC

name: vector_query_nodes_yield_where
query: CALL db.index.vector.queryNodes('user_embedding_idx', 3, $query) YIELD node, score WHERE node.region = 'west' RETURN node.id, score ORDER BY score DESC
